p2p_enrich.notes: Docker image built successfully. Added 4 new pass-to-pass tests: packages_directory_structure (static), git_repo_valid (repo_tests), node_version (repo_tests), pnpm_version (repo_tests). Fixed origin of existing tests: lerna_json_valid, turbo_json_valid, next_package_json_valid changed from repo_tests to static (they only read JSON files). Verified all 9 pass-to-pass tests pass. The 5 fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on base commit. CI commands tested: node --version (passes), git rev-parse (passes), pnpm --version (not installed in Docker, handled gracefully). Repo CI workflows analyzed: build_and_test.yml runs lint-no-typescript, check-examples, validate-externals-doc, types-and-precompiled, test-cargo-unit, rust-check. Many Node.js scripts fail without dependencies installed.
